case_title: MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY CASTRO VS. SONIA M MENJIVAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,400.00 FILED BY CASTRO, MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, SONIA M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE LISTED ON FORM SERVED OCT-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, SONIA M

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2015 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT (DEPT.-506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, SONIA M $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY CASTRO IS GRANTED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT NAME IN JUDGMENT GRANTED AS REQUESTED IN PETITION. SONIA M. MENJIVAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAXIMILIAN ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, SONIA M $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
